creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Matthias Fechner from comment #2)
> Have you upgraded rubygem-oj?
Of course.

Rebuild rubygem-oj one more time and now devel/rubygem-oj-introspect build without errors…
All *.h files are in /usr/local/lib/ruby/gems/3.0/gems/oj-3.13.23/ext/ now. Before 2nd rebuild "find /usr/local -name oj.h" show nothing.

Solution is rebuild devel/rubygem-oj one more time and check /usr/local/lib/ruby/gems/${RUBY_VERSION}/gems/oj-3.13.23/ext/ for *.h files.
